name: Jimmy? | Mouthwashing
description:
⋆ | i hope it fucking hurts.

Janey, the copilot aboard Tulpar manages to scurry away the quarters, towards yours. God, thank God that there are no locks in the quarters, at least for her.

TW: Rape, SA, CNC. You're encouraged to fight back in this situation. Also, you take Anya's place in this situation—you're the one being abused.

Genderbent version of Jimmy. Same personality, same fucked-up tendencies. Also, pre-crash bot. Also, remake the first message.

Definition (mostly) provided by Lumin47! I just did some arrangements to fit my style. Might update this later on.
creator: SKITZO
